notes: Policy-rate envelope. The headline is the full company tax rate. The base-rate entity rate is recorded in structured fields, but this dashboard does not use it as an oil and gas company tax-paid figure.
source_rights: Commonwealth copyright; ATO website terms apply
citation: Australian Taxation Office, Company tax rates.

fields.dashboard_use: Company tax policy rate only; actual company tax paid is handled by the separate who-pays-what company envelopes.
